issues.sample: I would like to report a safety issue with my wife’s new 2023 VW Jetta sedan with standard transmission. It has a hill hold feature that clamps the brakes on for approximately three seconds after you remove your foot from the brake pedal, if you are on a hill. Three seconds is wa

On April 1, 2023 I leased a 2023 VW Jetta for 39 months.  I test drove the car.  Upon delivery, it had 12 miles on the car.  I drove the car for 150 miles (162 TOTAL miles on car) At 11:30PM on April 6th, it left me stranded in the middle of the road. I called VW 36 month/36,000

After parking the car one day the remote app functions stopped working.  The next morning, a scary warning came on the dash stating: SOS Error: Emergency Call Function! Service Vehicle!  It also blocks off many functional areas of other dash display and the error will not go away

The contact owns a 2023 Volkswagen Jetta. The contact stated while driving 25 MPH in traffic, the Forward Collision Avoidance system activated, causing the vehicle to slow down and the Forward Collision Avoidance warning light illuminated. The dealer was contacted and stated that

narrative.headline: What 2023 Volkswagen Jetta owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 40 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (28% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
